svg.aria-label: Custom Webhook Authentication flow for Azure Event Grid MQTT Broker showing Option 1 Azure Function and Option 2 Custom HTTP endpoint within the same Entra ID tenant
svg.text: Custom authZ logic can be added
Key difference — same app, same token, different endpoint validation
App, tid, aud, client_id — JWT is identical in both options.
Azure Function uses built-in Entra ID auth — zero validation code required.
Custom endpoint uses Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens to validate the Entra JWT.
Developer implements token validation with optional custom authZ logic on top.
Replace placeholder IDs with values from your Entra ID app registration
